subject: [Confluent Cloud] Annual subscription renewal — action required

messages.subject: [Confluent Cloud] Annual subscription renewal — action required
messages.body_text:
Hi Jordan,

Your Confluent Cloud annual subscription is set to renew on March 1, 2026.

Subscription: Kafka Standard Cluster (3 partitions)
Organization: Vectrix Labs
Annual amount: $5,040.00
Renewal date: March 1, 2026
Payment method: Visa ending 4821

No action is required if you'd like to continue on the same plan. To upgrade, downgrade, or cancel, please log in at https://confluent.cloud before February 22, 2026.

Questions? Contact your account manager at enterprise@confluent.io.

— Confluent Cloud

messages.subject: Fwd: Confluent renewal — $5,040 due March 1
messages.body_text:
Marcus,

Forwarding the Confluent renewal. $5,040/year — same as last year. I think we should renew; we're not ready to self-host Kafka and the managed overhead is worth it at our volume.

Also separately: we had a GitHub Actions CI failure on the main branch at 2am last night — deploy to staging was blocked for about 3 hours. Fixed itself after a GitHub incident resolved. No customer impact but I'm going to add a fallback deploy path for staging so a CI outage doesn't block us. I'll file a Linear ticket.

— Jordan Okafor
DevOps / Infra, Vectrix Labs
jordan@vectrix.io
